zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Hawes於大約1464年出生時，她的父親Sir John Hawes20歲，母親Johanna Moore22歲。她於大約1480年與Sir William FitzWilliam在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1513年享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾比特爾波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Hawes于大约1464年出生时，她的父亲Sir John Hawes20岁，母亲Johanna Moore22岁。她于大约1480年与Sir William FitzWilliam在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1513年享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾比特爾波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Hawes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: of Norman origin, from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English Haueis, Hawis, from an Old French form of the ancient Germanic female personal name Hadewidis (from had- ‘war’ + wid- with a range of possible original meanings).
variant of Haw , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Haw
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Haw(e) which, like Daw(e), was probably a rhyming pet form of Middle English Raw (Ralph). Similar rhyming pet forms of other Anglo-Norman male personal names beginning with R- are found in Hick and Dick for Rick (Richard) and Hob and Dob for Rob(ert). See also Hawkin .
English: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from Middle English hawe ‘enclosure’ (Old English haga or Old Norse hagi). Compare Haugh .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Hawes was born about 1464, her father, Sir John Hawes, was 20 and her mother, Johanna Moore, was 22. She married Sir William FitzWilliam about 1480, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1513, at the age of 51, and was buried in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Hawes est née environ 1464, son père, Sir John Hawes, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Johanna Moore, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William FitzWilliam environ 1480, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1513, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Hawes um 1464 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Hawes 20 und ihre Mutter Johanna Moore 22. Sie hat um 1480 in London, England Sir William FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1513 im Alter von 51 Jahren und wurde in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Hawes è nata il circa 1464, sua padre, Sir John Hawes, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Johanna Moore, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir William FitzWilliam circa 1480, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1513, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Hawesが約1464年に生まれた時，父Sir John Hawesは20歳，母Johanna Mooreは22歳であった。約1480年にイギリスロンドンでSir William FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1513年に51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアペテルボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Hawes(이)가 대략 1464년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hawes(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Moore(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1480년 영국 런던에서 Sir William FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1513년 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 피터버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Hawes nasceu aproximadamente 1464, seu pai, Sir John Hawes, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Moore, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William FitzWilliam aproximadamente 1480, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1513, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Hawes родилась около 1464 г., её отцу по имени Sir John Hawes было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Moore, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William FitzWilliam около 1480 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1513 г. в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности питирбороую, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Hawes nació aproximadamente 1464, su papá, Sir John Hawes, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Johanna Moore, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir William FitzWilliam aproximadamente 1480, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1513, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
